description: Hoka is a performance footwear and apparel brand founded in 2009 in Annecy, France, originally focused on maximalist trail running shoes. The brand is known for its distinctive oversized midsoles that provide cushioning and comfort for long-distance runners. Hoka has grown into a global lifestyle and athletic brand worn by runners, hikers, and everyday consumers worldwide.
